title: IMUSA USA Small Polished Mortar and Pestle, 3.75”, Granite
description:
About this item
COMPACT AND CONVENIENT: With a 3.75 inches diameter, this granite mortar and pestle is perfect for grinding and crushing small quantities of ingredients, providing a compact and efficient tool for everyday culinary tasks
STYLISH AND DURABLE: Made from high-quality granite with a polished exterior and natural finish, this mortar and pestle offers a sleek and durable design that is easy to clean and ideal for long-lasting use
EFFICIENT AND USER FRIENDLY: Featuring a rough granite surface and a comfortable pestle, this versatile tool excels at crushing and grinding garlic, ginger, spices, and more, enhancing flavor and texture
DIVERSE OPTIONS: Ideal for preparing and mashing ingredients such as garlic, pepper, and vanilla, this mortar and pestle helps release natural oils and aromas, making it a valuable addition to your kitchen
COOKING ESSENTIAL: Great for culinary enthusiasts who appreciate authentic flavors, this granite mortar and pestle is packaged in a gift box, making it an excellent choice for a thoughtful gift
reviews_5s: This thing is hefty. Beautifully made and definitely granite. Well polished and a good size for grinding egg shells for plant food. It's very good quality. Wish the pestil was a little longer, but that's more a personal preference.I've wanted one of these for a while now and I recently came across a recipe that included a use for it, so I purchased this one and it's the perfect size. Good quality and works well.Definitely worth the money especially if you need a small one and nothing huge. The outside is so smooth and so is the pestle it’s very durable and heavier then I thought it would be no smell to it just smelt new? Looked amazing and in great shape!We bought this for my nephew who is in love with Harry Potter’s story. He’s ‘in’ Ravenclaw. So when he asked for a mortar and pestle for Christmas I decided why not get him something useful. He was grinding allspice this afternoon. Seems to be sturdy, easy to clean, durable and a good value, potentially hours of fun.Exactly what I’m looking for. Grinds my fresh parsley in no time and I just love the feeling of being an alchemist lol. Well made bowl and pestleI am doing a mastic gum protocol and it tastes TERRIBLE. I bought this to powder the tablets so I can mix them with OJ. It seems to be made of granite, very heavy. Works better than expected.Looking forward to using it, it’s adorableThis was a replacement for an old marble mortar and pestle I used to have. I thought it looked exactly the same but this one is a bit bigger and heavier, which I prefer. I would recommend.This was the exact product that my friend had requested just prior to her birthday. She did not know that I had already ordered it and had it sent to her, and it arrived as expected on time. The weight is exactly like we had hoped for, and she will enjoy using it from here on.Needed a small spice grinder, and this mortar and pestle did the job. It does not take up much space in my small kitchen, but is a go to tool for garlic, spices and chilies. It arrived fast and was easy to season. Great kitchen tool.
reviews_1s:
Only the outside of the bowl is, at best, moderately polished. The pestie & inside of the bowl are not. This makes it useless for crushing small pills because most of the resulting powder sticks to the inside if the bowl & pestle. Thus < half of the medicine is available for use.I used it for one time and it fell apart!The product was smashed into pieces when it was delivered. The original box was put into a bag with no packing peanuts or anything else to absorb shocks while being transferred and shipping. It is solid as you can see in the pictures so the product is made well, but I had to leave one star because it was shattered into pieces by the time it got to my house.First one came broken. Returned and replaced with the second which started crumbling in to a powder in just few months. I had to throw the cooked food because I didn’t want that crumble to get in the food even if it’s ok! It’s a poor quality. I had throw it out.
I wouldn’t recommend this product at all!Cracked on two places! Used twice!I was surprised to see the size of this product (Mortar) as I was expecting a little bigger to grind at least a couple of Ginger and Garlic pieces, but this is absolutely too small to do anything. I would say it as a toy. Furthermore, I bought the real one from IKEA for the same price.Size was okay for grinding pills. Worked fine for 2 months then the pestle broke in half. Too late to return. Would give it more stars if I could get replacement.Returned first on cause it was broken. The second one also arrived broken. Done with this junk.للأسف وجدته مكسور
